nasb.text: Jael went out to meet Sisera, and said to him, “Turn aside, my master, turn aside to me! Do not be afraid.” And he turned aside to her into the tent, and she covered him with a rug.

esv.text: And Jael came out to meet Sisera and said to him, “Turn aside, my lord; turn aside to me; do not be afraid.” So he turned aside to her into the tent, and she covered him with a rug.

cnv.text: 雅億出來迎接西西拉，對他說：“請我主轉過來，到我這裡，不要懼怕。”西西拉就轉到她那裡去，就是轉到她的帳棚裡去；雅億就用毛氈遮蓋他。

ccb.text: 雅亿出来迎接西西拉，对他说：“我主，请进，不用怕！”西西拉便走进帐篷，雅亿为他盖上毯子。
